name: Idea / Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement or new idea for the outreach initiative

title: '[Idea] '
labels: ['idea']
body:
  - type: textarea
    id: description
    attributes:
      label: Description
      description: What's your idea?
      placeholder: Describe the idea...
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: context
    attributes:
      label: Background / Context
      description: Why does this matter?
      placeholder: Add context here...
